_comment: Default CircleMUD -> IronMUD specproc/trigger mapping. Translates each ASSIGN(MOB|OBJ|ROOM)(vnum, fname) binding from spec_assign.c (and castle_mob_spec from castle.c) into either a MobileFlags bit (set_mob_flag), a *Trigger struct push (add_mob_trigger / add_item_trigger / add_room_trigger), a builder-facing 'warn' note, or a silent 'drop'. Specprocs not listed here surface as a default 'warn' so the importer never silently loses a binding. Per-specproc 'warn' actions targeting >=3 vnums are collapsed to a single dedup line in the dry-run report. See docs/import-guide.md.

fallback_args: My god!  It's full of stars!
The mayor strolls thoughtfully through the streets.
The board is full of postings.
The ATM beeps and refuses your card.
The garbage is consumed by an unseen force.
